title: Page Settings

fields.label: Show Page Title
fields.name: show_page_title
fields.instructions: Control the visibility of the page title in the top of the page. Note: This setting only applies when using the fallback content template (standard WordPress editor). When using the Page Builder (Flexible Content) below, this setting is ignored.

description: Configure page-level display settings. These settings control how the page is rendered when not using the Page Builder.
